results.title: Seerat Kapoor Unveils Her Dream Villa ‘Jade’ in Lonavala — A Soulful Sanctuary of Art, Nature & Quiet Luxury
results.description: Actor Seerat Kapoor has opened the doors to one of her most personal dreams yet — a breathtaking five-bedroom luxury villa named Jade, nestled amidst the serene hills and lush greenery of Lonavala. Blending earthy elegance with nature-led design, the villa reflects a deeply personal journey shaped by family, creativity, travel and intentional living. Without any formal campaigns, Jade has quietly become one of Lonavala’s most talked-about luxury retreats, attracting attention through word of mouth,... The post Seerat Kapoor Unveils Her Dream Villa ‘Jade’ in Lonavala — A Soulful Sanctuary of Art, Nature & Quiet Luxury appeared first on Indore Mirror .

results.title: Trump says a deal with Iran and opening of Strait of Hormuz are ‘largely negotiated’
results.description: President Donald Trump said Saturday that a deal with Iran, including opening the Strait of Hormuz, has been “largely negotiated” after calls with Israel and other allies in the region. “Final aspects and details of the Deal are currently being discussed, and will be announced shortly,” Trump said on social media, with no details on timing. He said he had spoken with leaders from Saudi Arabia, the United Arab Emirates, Qatar, Pakistan, Turkey, Egypt, Jordan and Bahrain, and separately with Israel. He described it as a “Memorandum of Understanding pertaining to PEACE” that still must be finalized by the United...

results.title: South African investors mobilize over $10million funding to back Australian miner Orion Minerals’ expansion
results.description: Australian mining company Orion Minerals is raising A$15.4 million ($10.9 million) through a share placement backed by South African institutional investors, as the company moves to accelerate development of its key copper and zinc assets in the country.
